---
title: "ghost_warden.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\wardens\ghost_warden.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 12
logic_score: 5.07
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 7.80
overall_score: 3.66
---

## Intent
The `ghost_warden.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on GhostWarden, __init__, scan, adjudicate. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via GhostWarden, __init__, scan, adjudicate. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `GhostWarden`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `adjudicate`
